source_feedback: User reported unclear key content, unclear English pronunciation, segment discontinuities, breakpoints, and repeated content in F5-TTS full-length voiceover.
User reported repeated leakage of the phrase 为什么重要 after switching to a neutral F5 reference recording.
User requested a hard sample-first review gate and a local ASR transcript diff gate before full segmented generation and render.
User requested a standing pronunciation rule: the 地 in 动态地 must be read de, not di, across future document, voiceover, and prompt generation.

User requested a post-episode retrospective for the first successful video: summarize prompt patterns, recurring failures, voiceover requirements, and identify what should become README hard constraints or dedicated workflow skills.

implemented_candidates.change: Add a TTS preparation layer that rewrites numbers, acronyms, English terms, formulas, and key concepts into Chinese-friendly spoken text.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Improves pronunciation of ChatGPT, Claude, AI Agent, BERT, GPT, MCP, KV Cache, vLLM, 2017, QKV, and core Transformer terms.
implemented_candidates.risk: Spoken audio can become longer than existing video timing.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm run audio:f5-prepare-segments and review audio/f5_tts/segments/segment_manifest.json.

implemented_candidates.change: Generate one scene at a time and merge scene audio with short pauses instead of sending the whole 3-minute script to F5-TTS.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Reduces long-text batch artifacts, reference phrase leakage, and repeated content; allows per-segment regeneration.
implemented_candidates.risk: Per-scene generation is slower and may create slight voice/prosody resets between scenes.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run powershell -File scripts/f5_tts_generate_segmented.ps1 and review individual seg_*.wav files before merge.

implemented_candidates.change: Shorten the canonical neutral F5 reference text to remove 为什么重要 and block leak-prone phrases such as 为什么重要, 改变了模型阅读序列的方式, and 改变了模型理解语言的方式 before any TTS call.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Prevents reference-text content from being repeatedly injected into every generated segment.
implemented_candidates.risk: A shorter reference clip gives F5-TTS slightly less prosody context, so human timbre review remains required.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm run audio:f5-check-reference and confirm status=ready, duration is 7-10.5s, blocking_items is empty, and reference text has no leak-prone phrase.

implemented_candidates.change: Keep script/voice_segments.json as the only narration source; the TTS preparation layer may normalize pronunciation but must not inject hidden cue phrases absent from source_text.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Keeps generated audio aligned with reviewed voiceover text and reduces unexplained narration drift.
implemented_candidates.risk: Hook emphasis must now be written explicitly into the script instead of silently added by the adapter.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm run audio:f5-prepare-segments and inspect audio/f5_tts/segments/segment_manifest.json for source_text/spoken_text drift.

implemented_candidates.change: Add a hard sample-first gate: generate seg_001, seg_010, and seg_014 before full generation, then require review/sample_audio_review.json.status=approved with the current segment_text_hash.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Prevents expensive full-length audio and video renders when representative F5-TTS samples show leakage, repetition, pronunciation drift, or pacing problems.
implemented_candidates.risk: Full generation now intentionally stops until human approval is recorded.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm run audio:f5-generate-samples followed by npm run audio:sample-review-gate; the gate must block until the sample review is approved.

implemented_candidates.change: Add a local ASR transcript diff gate that compares ASR transcript segments against spoken_text and blocks leak-prone phrases or large transcript distance when ASR output exists.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Adds an automated QA path for repeated phrases, reference-text leakage, and spoken_text drift before full rendering.
implemented_candidates.risk: Local ASR is not currently installed; until transcript artifacts exist, the gate records asr_missing and keeps human listening review mandatory.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm run audio:asr-transcript-diff and inspect audio/asr/transcript_diff_report.json.

implemented_candidates.change: Add a standing pronunciation rule for Chinese ambiguous particles: 动态地 uses 地 as the adverbial particle pronounced de. TTS spoken_text may rewrite it as 以动态方式 to avoid di misreading.
implemented_candidates.expected_impact: Prevents future voiceovers and generated prompts from mispronouncing high-frequency technical phrases such as 动态地建立关系.
implemented_candidates.risk: The display text and spoken_text can differ slightly for pronunciation safety, so source_text/spoken_text separation must remain visible in review.
implemented_candidates.verification: Run npm test -- tests/runtime_adapters.test.ts and inspect audio/f5_tts/segments/segment_manifest.json after audio:f5-prepare-segments.

recommended_next_candidates.reason: CosyVoice highlights multilingual and cross-lingual zero-shot cloning, pronunciation inpainting for Chinese Pinyin and English CMU phonemes, text normalization, and repetition-aware sampling.
recommended_next_candidates.expected_impact: Best next backend to test for mixed Chinese-English technical narration.

recommended_next_candidates.reason: GPT-SoVITS supports zero-shot/few-shot cloning, cross-lingual inference, and integrated segmentation/ASR/text labeling tools.
recommended_next_candidates.expected_impact: Strong candidate if the priority is Chinese timbre similarity and long-term personal voice series quality.

recommended_next_candidates.reason: IndexTTS2 focuses on duration control for audio-visual synchronization and reports strong zero-shot clarity metrics.
recommended_next_candidates.expected_impact: Good candidate when video duration matching becomes more important than fastest local setup.

retention_guidance: Keep segmented TTS generation even if the backend changes.
Keep spoken_text separate from source_text so captions can remain technical while audio uses natural Chinese phrasing.
Do not import a longer review audio into the canonical video track until human audio review approves it.

post_episode_retrospective.boundary: workflow-optimizer suggestions only; do not auto-edit README, SKILL.md, platform profiles, or quality gates before human approval
evidence_inputs: review/improvement_candidates.json existing F5-TTS and pronunciation findings
memory notes for F5 sample/ASR gates and safe90 cover constraint

recommended_readme_hard_constraints.change: Add a Voiceover Hard Gates section: consent and voice manifest required; neutral 8-10s F5 reference; sample-first gate before full TTS; ASR transcript diff when available; duplicate/reference-leak checks before merge and render.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.reason: The first video repeatedly hit noisy audio, reference-text leakage, unclear English terms, repeated phrases, and segment discontinuities before the gate was introduced.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.expected_impact: Prevents expensive full audio/video reruns when representative samples already show drift or leakage.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.risk: The README can become too procedural if it duplicates script-level details.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.verification: Add or extend a docs constraint test that checks README mentions sample-first, ASR diff, neutral reference, duplicate guard, and source_text/spoken_text separation.

recommended_readme_hard_constraints.change: Add a Script Quality Contract section: the script must explain why the paper matters in today's AI era; include Hook, Feynman explanation, engineering accuracy, modern LLM connection, risk/cost, and next-episode CTA.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.reason: The strongest user feedback was that the script should not be only a paper explainer; it must connect Transformer to ChatGPT, Claude, Agent, Sora, MCP, and modern inference engineering without mixing system layers.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.expected_impact: Keeps future videos aligned with the channel thesis and reduces late-stage script rewrites.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.risk: Too many required beats can make short videos feel overloaded.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.verification: Require script/storyboard review to confirm one core thesis, first-scene hook, Feynman explanation, engineering correction notes, and platform-specific opening.

recommended_readme_hard_constraints.change: Add a Review Before Render section: do not claim completion until qa_report passes; keep real TTS/render separate from deterministic tests; Dagu progress must point to manifests/reports, not just command execution.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.reason: Several issues became visible only after listening or checking generated artifacts; command success alone was not enough.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.expected_impact: Makes completion claims evidence-based and easier to audit from Dagu or pipeline_map.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.risk: May slow iteration if every draft is treated as publish-ready review.
recommended_readme_hard_constraints.verification: Run npm test, npm run typecheck, audio sample gate, quality gate, and inspect manifest/report paths for the latest episode.

recommended_skill_candidates.change: Create a focused skill for cloned/personal-voice TTS QA: reference safety, sample-first review, ASR diff, duplicate guard, spoken_text normalization, English term handling, segment merge, and import rules.
recommended_skill_candidates.reason: Voiceover failures caused the most rework and are reusable across every future paper video.
recommended_skill_candidates.expected_impact: Turns F5-TTS/CosyVoice/GPT-SoVITS usage into an auditable workflow instead of ad hoc generation commands.
recommended_skill_candidates.risk: May overlap with voiceover-adapter unless boundaries are explicit: adapter creates/imports audio; quality-gate skill approves whether generation may proceed.
recommended_skill_candidates.verification: Forward-test with a request to generate full voiceover and confirm the agent stops at sample approval before full generation.

recommended_skill_candidates.change: Create a reviewer skill that checks paper scripts for technical correctness, Feynman clarity, modern LLM engineering context, and over-simplification risks before TTS.
recommended_skill_candidates.reason: The first script needed review corrections: Attention is weighted aggregation rather than magically seeing the full sentence; Q/K/V are learned projection spaces; Multi-Head roles are learned rather than manually assigned; Sora, Agent, and MCP are different system layers.
recommended_skill_candidates.expected_impact: Catches conceptual drift before animation/audio production, where changes are more expensive.
recommended_skill_candidates.risk: Can make scripts too academic if the reviewer over-corrects all analogies.
recommended_skill_candidates.verification: Review one existing script and produce a pass/fix list with blocking and non-blocking issues.

recommended_skill_candidates.change: Codify platform hooks: Douyin strong hook, Xiaohongshu save-worthy cover/title, Bilibili credible agenda, YouTube Shorts global context, X visual summary.
recommended_skill_candidates.reason: The user repeatedly asked how to attract viewers and support domestic Chinese vs overseas English platform modes.
recommended_skill_candidates.expected_impact: Reduces generic openings and makes platform outputs more native.
recommended_skill_candidates.risk: Could become formulaic if every episode uses identical hook patterns.
recommended_skill_candidates.verification: Ensure hooks.json includes at least three candidates per platform with scores, risk flags, visual cue, and selected rationale.

recommended_skill_candidates.change: Require scene-to-asset mapping for original paper figures, formulas, architecture diagrams, and explanatory animations; verify subtitles do not cover key formulas.
recommended_skill_candidates.reason: The user explicitly required original paper images/formulas plus HyperFrames animation, not generic abstract visuals.
recommended_skill_candidates.expected_impact: Improves educational trust and visual comprehension.
recommended_skill_candidates.risk: Copyright/source attribution and visual clutter need review.
recommended_skill_candidates.verification: Inspect storyboard/assets_manifest and render keyframes for original figure/formula presence and safe caption placement.

recommended_quality_gate_candidates.change: Check cover file format, 1080x1920 canvas, 90% content scale metadata or safe90 filename, and platform-safe margins before publish pack.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.reason: Douyin cover upload overflow required a safe90 export rule.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.risk: Image content-scale detection may need metadata or naming convention if pixel analysis is too brittle.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.verification: Run cover constraint test and inspect publish pack cover paths.

recommended_quality_gate_candidates.change: Surface sample review status, ASR diff status, duplicate guard status, and reference safety status in QA and pipeline map outputs.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.reason: The user wanted to see GPT-SoVITS/F5 progress and failure reasons in Dagu rather than hidden terminal steps.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.expected_impact: Makes audio progress auditable from the dashboard and review files.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.risk: QA report can become noisy if every intermediate artifact is listed.
recommended_quality_gate_candidates.verification: Run pipeline_map after audio gates and confirm each status is visible with input/output paths.

do_not_promote_to_hard_constraints: Do not hard-code F5-TTS as the only future voice backend; keep backend bakeoff open for CosyVoice, GPT-SoVITS, and IndexTTS-style duration-control options.
Do not enforce a fixed 60-90s or 108s duration for every episode; prefer clarity, subtitles, and visual alignment over arbitrary time caps.
Do not treat phone-side playback speed reduction as the production audio quality solution; it can be a publishing workaround, not a generation standard.
Do not let hidden prompt cues such as 重点来了 or 需要关注 be injected after script approval; write them explicitly into source_text if needed.
retention_guidance: After each successful episode, workflow-optimizer should produce retrospective candidates before mainline README or skill edits.
Promote only repeated, high-impact failures into README hard constraints; put operational procedures into skills or scripts.
Every candidate promoted to mainline should add a small docs or contract test so the rule remains visible to future agents.
